what_changed: Mack completed unit test suite for winnie_proactive_health.py with 100% pass rate and fixed a datetime.utcnow() deprecation warning.

hypotheses: Integrating the verify_gate_compliance.py hook directly into the smoke test enforces gate existence checks at runtime.
Mocking sys.exit in unit tests prevents unwanted test runner terminations.
Handling sys.exit(1) assertions in test scripts ensures execution halts predictably.
broadcasts: Mack implemented test_winnie_health_gate.py achieving 100% test coverage.
